title: poliomintha dendritica
intro: Poliomintha dendritica, also known as Mexican oregano or false oregano, is a shrubby herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poliomintha dendritica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Poliomintha dendritica are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
